directive_events.owner_directive: Backend implemented by manager on umbrella; frontend dispatched (feature/adr-044-frontend-20260621); no-context auditor dispatched after integration. Decisions D1-D8 recorded in checklist.
hotfix1: subworkflow block 的 config 没按新契约（config 分 2 列）来；只改 subworkflow，不动全局
directive_events.reason: owner-directed live hotfix on PR #1736: SubworkflowConfigEditor does not follow the 2-column config layout other blocks use

directive_events.owner_directive: hotfix3: subworkflow 内部开放端口没暴露到 block 外部、运行报必填输入未连。同意 import 时自动派生 exposed_ports，暴露所有未连输入 + 所有未连输出
directive_events.reason: owner-directed live hotfix: subworkflow import must auto-derive exposed_ports from open (unconnected) ports; extends ADR-044 manual-author design

directive_events.owner_directive: hotfix4: subworkflow block 没有运行状态提示（折叠节点 + 双击展开都看不出跑没跑），运行时 preview 不显示数据
directive_events.reason: owner-directed live hotfix: subworkflow block shows no run status (collapsed + expanded) and preview shows no data, because flattened inner events are keyed by prefixed ids '<sw_id>__<inner>' the collapsed node id never matches

directive_events.owner_directive: 双击打开的 workflow 打开错了（不是 subworkflows 拷贝那一版），所以没状态没 preview
directive_events.reason: hotfix4 followup: double-click opened the wrong file because workflow tabs dedup by shared workflow.id; subworkflow copies all share one id. Add a path-based tabKey identity so each referenced copy opens as its own tab with the correct run-scope prefix

directive_events.owner_directive: hotfix5: 暴露在外的 port 看不出属于 subworkflow 里哪个 block，需要一个 port panel 写清楚每个 port 属于哪个 block
directive_events.reason: hotfix5: exposed subworkflow ports are named <inner>.<port> and the user cannot tell which inner block each belongs to. Enrich resolved_ports with owning block id/type/label and add a port panel

owner_directive: Full ADR-044 implementation: SubWorkflowBlock authoring-only + inline flattening at run start; no-context audit + fix P1-P3; complete integration tests; Chrome e2e; READY FOR REVIEW summary PR. Owner-directed manager session 2026-06-21.
